title: tilingia coreana
intro: Tilingia coreana is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Korea. The plant has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Tilingia coreana is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough, and promoting digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed for their medicinal effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
